posts.author: marianne (coudert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have seen on this page https://monday.com/partners/referral-partner that there is a partner certification program for referral partners. I am now a referral partner but I don’t see where I can access this certification program. Can you help me ?
I would like to learn more about Monday and have an official certification tag to share with my network to have new clients.

Thanks !
